title: Alytus、Alytus County — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Alytus、Alytus Countyの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

AlytusはAlytus Countyにある人口55,000の都市です。The largest city in southern Lithuania, known for its location on the Nemunas River, the Alytus Zoo, and a growing industrial and logistics sector.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
